subject: Sociology
title: Education as Liberation
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Education as Liberation.

hook.text: Enslaved people risked death to learn to read. Education has always been both a privilege and a weapon.

buildup.text: Paulo Freire argued that education should awaken critical consciousness, not deposit facts into passive minds.

discovery.text: His banking model critique showed how traditional education treats students as empty vessels to fill.

twist.text: Liberating education is threatening to power. Freire was exiled for teaching the poor to question their world.

climax.text: Education at its best doesn't just inform. It transforms, giving people tools to challenge injustice.

punchline.text: The greatest lesson is to question.

quiz.question: What did Paulo Freire criticize about traditional education?
options: It treats students as passive vessels to fill with facts
